title: agrostis stolonifera var. straminea
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. straminea, commonly known as green crested hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in traditional herbal remedies for treating wounds and infections. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Agrostis stolonifera var. straminea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
